title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
